creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mezz        2012-03-16 02:18:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/gnome-schedule Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 2.1.5.
  - Add license.
  - Make applet easy disable, since it will not work with gnome3.
  - Respect WITHOUT_NLS
  - Add note about FreeBSD-specific issue with one-time tasks (please see
    https://bugzilla.gnome.org/show_bug.cgi?id=660590 for details)
  
  PR:             ports/161180
  Submitted by:   Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src@yandex.ru>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.19      +26 -3     ports/sysutils/gnome-schedule/Makefile
  1.6       +2 -2      ports/sysutils/gnome-schedule/distinfo
  1.5       +80 -49    ports/sysutils/gnome-schedule/pkg-plist
